revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-1-505

A linear array of elements whose centres lie on a straight line and whose principal direction of radiation or reception is along this line. An end fire array is often composed of a number of parallel dipoles or monopoles which are coplanar and equally spaced.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|End fire array}}
